Stop.command: echo Hook: verify-exports si cambian index.js de capas backend
Stop.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (-not (Test-Path 'backend/package.json')) { exit 0 }; $changes = git status --porcelain | Select-String -Pattern 'backend/(controllers|repositories|errors|helps)/index\.js' -Quiet; if ($changes) { Push-Location backend; npm run verify-exports; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $code } else { Write-Output 'No backend layer index.js changes detected.'; exit 0 }"
Stop.linux: bash -lc 'if [ ! -f backend/package.json ]; then exit 0; fi; if git status --porcelain | grep -Eq backend/(controllers|repositories|errors|helps)/index\.js; then cd backend && npm run verify-exports; else echo No-backend-layer-index.js-changes-detected.; fi'
Stop.osx: bash -lc 'if [ ! -f backend/package.json ]; then exit 0; fi; if git status --porcelain | grep -Eq backend/(controllers|repositories|errors|helps)/index\.js; then cd backend && npm run verify-exports; else echo No-backend-layer-index.js-changes-detected.; fi'
